100.comment: The minimum z-index value, use not defined.

600.comment: Value commonly used for overlay elements, modals and sidebars.

700.comment: Value commonly used for modals and sidebars.

800.comment: Value commonly used floating components like toasts, tooltips and popovers.

900.comment: The highest general-purpose z-index value, use not defined.

1000.comment: Reserved for Modal overlay when zIndex='top'. Do not use elsewhere.

1100.comment: Reserved for Modal container when zIndex='top'. Do not use elsewhere.
